submission_outcomes.complete: Eligible, uncontaminated, licensed, reproducible, replayable, behaviorally equivalent, output-complete, and mutation-sensitive.
submission_outcomes.partial: Eligible and uncontaminated, but one or more nonfatal required gates are incomplete or only partially satisfied.
submission_outcomes.failed: Eligible and uncontaminated, but a required behavioral, licensing, replay, output, regeneration, or mutation gate fails.
submission_outcomes.contaminated: Prohibited exposure or implementation dependence invalidates primary replication eligibility.
submission_outcomes.inconclusive: Eligibility, provenance, environment, or discrepancy status cannot be resolved under the frozen protocol.

vocabulary_replication_success: At least one eligible uncontaminated complete submission for the vocabulary, with no unresolved material verifier discrepancy.
overall_replication_success: Every official vocabulary satisfies vocabulary_replication_success, at least two independent implementation teams contribute counted submissions, and the verifier independence audit passes.
overall_partial: At least one official vocabulary succeeds and at least one is partial, failed, missing, or inconclusive, with no basis for overall success.
overall_failed: One or more official vocabularies have eligible uncontaminated submissions but none complete, or the independent verifier finds a material behavioral contradiction.
overall_contaminated: Independence requirements are materially violated across the counted replication set.
overall_inconclusive: The minimum replication set, eligibility, verifier independence, or material discrepancies cannot be resolved.
aggregation_policy: Report all submissions. Primary aggregation excludes contaminated submissions but lists them and their exclusion reasons. No submission may be discarded for divergence.
